title: Greeting at the Viewpoint
learning_goal: Start a friendly conversation with a guide.

dialogue.speaker: May
dialogue.text: Hello! Welcome to the viewpoint.

dialogue.speaker: Linh
dialogue.text: Hello, nice to meet you. My name is Linh.

dialogue.speaker: May
dialogue.text: Nice to meet you, Linh. Can I help you?

hint: Choose the friendly phrase you say when you meet someone.
explanation_vi: Dùng “Hello, nice to meet you” khi chào và làm quen với người mới.

title: Asking for Directions
learning_goal: Ask where to go and understand simple route words.

dialogue.speaker: Linh
dialogue.text: Where is the road to the viewpoint?

dialogue.speaker: May
dialogue.text: Go straight, then turn left near the tea shop.

dialogue.speaker: Linh
dialogue.text: Thank you. I will go straight, then turn left.

npc_line: Go straight, then turn left near the tea shop.
hint: Listen for route words like straight, left, and right.
explanation_vi: Câu đúng nhắc lại chỉ dẫn đường: đi thẳng rồi rẽ trái.

title: Ordering Tea
learning_goal: Order a drink politely at a homestay or cafe.

dialogue.speaker: Linh
dialogue.text: May I have tea, please?

dialogue.speaker: Lan
dialogue.text: Of course. One cup of tea.

dialogue.speaker: Linh
dialogue.text: How much is it?

npc_line: Of course. One cup of tea.
hint: Use “please” to make the request polite.
explanation_vi: “May I have tea, please?” là cách gọi trà lịch sự.

title: Checking the Weather

dialogue.speaker: Linh
dialogue.text: What is the weather like today?

dialogue.speaker: May
dialogue.text: It is cloudy and a little rainy.

dialogue.speaker: Linh
dialogue.text: Is the road safe?

npc_line: It is cloudy and a little rainy.
choices: What is the weather like today?
hint: Ask about the weather before you ride.
explanation_vi: Câu hỏi “What is the weather like today?” dùng để hỏi thời tiết hôm nay.

title: Homestay Introduction
learning_goal: Introduce yourself to a host and answer simple questions.

dialogue.speaker: Lan
dialogue.text: Welcome to my homestay.

dialogue.speaker: Linh
dialogue.text: Thank you. I am Linh, and I am learning English.

dialogue.speaker: Lan
dialogue.text: That is wonderful. Please come in.

choices: I am Linh, and I am learning English.
Turn left near the tea shop.
hint: Say your name and one simple fact about yourself.
explanation_vi: Khi gặp chủ nhà, hãy giới thiệu tên và nói bạn đang học tiếng Anh.

title: Describing a Bike Problem
learning_goal: Use simple words to describe a travel problem.

dialogue.speaker: Linh
dialogue.text: The wheel is loose. Can you check it?

dialogue.speaker: Binh
dialogue.text: Yes, I can check it now.

dialogue.speaker: Linh
dialogue.text: Thank you. The light is also broken.

npc_line: Yes, I can check it now.
choices: The wheel is loose. Can you check it?
hint: Name the bike part and describe the problem clearly.
explanation_vi: Câu đúng nêu vấn đề xe: bánh xe bị lỏng và nhờ kiểm tra.

title: Polite Repair Request
learning_goal: Ask for help politely and confirm a price.

dialogue.speaker: Linh
dialogue.text: Could you fix it, please?

dialogue.speaker: Binh
dialogue.text: Yes. It will take ten minutes.

dialogue.speaker: Linh
dialogue.text: That is okay. Thank you.

npc_line: Yes. It will take ten minutes.
hint: Use “could you” and “please” to ask politely.
explanation_vi: “Could you fix it, please?” là lời nhờ sửa xe lịch sự.

title: Talking About Plans
learning_goal: Say where you plan to go next.
key_phrases: I will go to the village.
I plan to leave in the morning.

dialogue.speaker: May
dialogue.text: What is your plan?

dialogue.speaker: Linh
dialogue.text: I will go to the village in the morning.

dialogue.speaker: May
dialogue.text: Good. Please ride slowly.

choices: I will go to the village in the morning.
hint: Use “I will” to talk about your next plan.
explanation_vi: Dùng “I will...” để nói kế hoạch sẽ làm trong tương lai.

title: Saying Thank You
learning_goal: Express gratitude after receiving help or food.

dialogue.speaker: Linh
dialogue.text: Thank you for dinner. It was delicious.

dialogue.speaker: Lan
dialogue.text: You are welcome.

dialogue.speaker: Linh
dialogue.text: You are very kind.

choices: Thank you for dinner. It was delicious.
hint: After food or help, say thank you and add a kind detail.
explanation_vi: Câu đúng cảm ơn bữa tối và khen món ăn ngon.

title: Sharing a Travel Story
learning_goal: Tell a short story about a place you visited.
key_phrases: Today I visited the mountain pass.

dialogue.speaker: Lan
dialogue.text: What did you do today?

dialogue.speaker: Linh
dialogue.text: Today I visited the mountain pass.

dialogue.speaker: Linh
dialogue.text: The view was beautiful, and I learned new English words.

choices: Today I visited the mountain pass.
hint: Answer with one thing you did today.
explanation_vi: Câu đúng kể một việc đã làm hôm nay: đã thăm đèo núi.
